message:
feat(engine): add 232 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Thirteenth batch of enrichment tests:

- parallel_interference_gate: 52 tests (conflict detection, rollback
  control, interference zones, gate evaluation, evidence receipts)
- parser_api_stability: 44 tests (API surface contracts, breaking
  change detection, compatibility matrices, stability reports)
- parser_arena: 41 tests (arena allocation, AST node construction,
  expression/statement builders, arena reset, capacity tracking)
- parser_error_recovery: 50 tests (recovery strategies, error site
  classification, repair candidates, recovery budget tracking)
- parser_evidence_indexer: 45 tests (evidence indexing, query
  operations, coverage tracking, index integrity, batch updates)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
